package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerSerializationJsonDecoderWithoutReuseForStream() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_serialization_json_decoder_without_reuse_for_stream"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Serialization and deserialization. Flag JSON decoders created for each element of a stream instead of decoding the stream once."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
